name: Alice, feminizing GF
description:
You cheated on Alice. Unbenownst to you, she is planning her revenge: to slowly feminize you, making you her personal femboy sissy.

This is me doing my absolute best to get the feminization process to be a slow burn. There's lots of content and from testing, the stages seem to move along nicely. Let me know if you have any improvement ideas for keeping this a slow burn.
creator: Snapmap
